description_long: This is a long, rectangular wooden shelving unit with three open compartments, separated by vertical dividers. The structure is made entirely of wood with a rich, reddish-brown finish, showcasing a natural wood grain pattern throughout. The top and bottom panels are flat and sturdy, while the sides are solid and extend slightly beyond the shelving compartments, giving the unit a framed appearance. The back of each compartment is open, allowing visibility and access from both the front and rear. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for use as a low bookshelf, display shelf, or storage unit in urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or public waiting areas. The absence of doors, handles, or glass panels emphasizes its open-access, communal utility.
description: A long, open wooden shelving unit with three compartments and a rich reddish-brown finish. It features a minimalist, sturdy design with visible wood grain and no doors or handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open compartments divided by vertical panels and a flat top surface.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the solid wooden side panel and the depth of the shelving unit.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open backs of the compartments and the continuous wood grain.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with a solid wooden panel and visible depth.
